parameters.summary: Phase 0 stabilisation continuing: TV pilot-10 private staging accepted 19 episodes (Haunted Hotel 5, MobLand 9, The Institute 5) with 9 held; Mission 002 v2 discovery PASS with 196 candidates, 40 probes, AFL coverage adequate via 7AFL; all gates REVIEW, PAUSE_PUBLICATION active, no legacy resolver activity.
